module_info.docstring:
Classify tool selection failures into categories: discovery, sequencing, scale.

Usage:
    python3 classify-failures.py --session-id=<id>    # Classify one session
    python3 classify-failures.py --all-unclassified    # Classify all unclassified
    python3 classify-failures.py --dry-run --session-id=<id>  # Preview without updating

functions.name: get_session_events
functions.docstring: Get all tool_selection_events for a session, ordered by seq.

functions.name: get_unclassified_failures
functions.docstring: Get failure events that need classification.

functions.name: classify_discovery
functions.docstring: Check if failure is a discovery problem (agent couldn't find the right tool).

functions.name: classify_sequencing
functions.docstring: Check if failure is a sequencing problem (wrong order or missed preconditions).

functions.name: classify_scale
functions.docstring: Check if failure correlates with high tool count (scale degradation).

functions.name: classify_event
functions.docstring: Apply all classifiers and return the best category.
